health.title: Healthy Amaranthus Plant
health.summary: The uploaded Amaranthus leaf appears healthy with no visible symptoms of major disease infection.
health.possible_cause: Proper crop management, balanced nutrition, and favorable environmental conditions.
prevention: Avoid excessive moisture in the field.
Monitor plants frequently for early disease symptoms.
treatment: No treatment required at this stage.

spot_leaf.title: Amaranthus Leaf Spot Disease
spot_leaf.summary: The leaf shows symptoms associated with leaf spot disease, including dark lesions or necrotic spots that may reduce plant growth and yield.
spot_leaf.possible_cause: Fungal infection favored by high humidity, excessive moisture, poor air circulation, and infected plant debris.
recommended_action: Remove and destroy infected leaves immediately.
Avoid water stagnation in the field.
Monitor neighboring plants for infection spread.
treatment: Apply recommended fungicides according to agricultural guidelines.
Consult local agricultural experts for severe infections.

white_rust.title: Amaranthus White Rust Disease
white_rust.summary: The leaf exhibits symptoms consistent with white rust disease, commonly identified by white pustules or patches on leaf surfaces.
white_rust.possible_cause: White rust is caused by pathogen infection under cool and humid environmental conditions.
recommended_action: Remove infected plants or leaves immediately.
Improve drainage in the cultivation area.
treatment: Repeat treatment following agricultural instructions if symptoms persist.

non_amaranthus.title: Non-Amaranthus Image Detected
non_amaranthus.summary: The uploaded image does not appear to contain an Amaranthus leaf or contains an unsupported object.
non_amaranthus.possible_cause: Incorrect image upload, unclear image quality, or unsupported plant species.
recommended_action: Upload a clear Amaranthus leaf image.
Ensure the leaf occupies most of the image.
Capture the image under proper lighting conditions.
prevention: Avoid complex backgrounds during image capture.
treatment: No treatment available because the image is not identified as Amaranthus.
